zh-TW.title: 開發環境與硬體地圖
zh-TW.summary: 建立 ESP32 開發環境、板子架構與腳位地圖，為馬達控制課程打底。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 幫學員先把開發工具、板子結構與腳位配置整理清楚，讓後續的 PWM、感測與控制迴路可以在同一個基礎上展開。
coreContent: 安裝並確認 ESP32 開發環境
理解板子架構與開發流程
整理腳位與外部模組對照

en.title: Development Environment and Hardware Map
en.summary: Set up the ESP32 environment, board architecture, and pin map as the foundation for motor control.
en.description: This lesson aligns the development tools, board structure, and pin layout so later PWM, sensing, and control-loop work can build on the same base.
coreContent: Set up the ESP32 development environment
Understand the board architecture and workflow
Map pins and external modules clearly

zh-TW.title: PWM 與馬達輸出
zh-TW.summary: 從 PWM、LEDC 與 H-Bridge 開始建立馬達輸出鏈路。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員理解輸出訊號如何轉成實際馬達驅動，並建立後續精準控制所需的硬體基礎。
coreContent: 認識 pullup 與 debounce 的必要性
比較 ADC 解析度與訊號品質
調整取樣率以避免輸入抖動

en.title: PWM Motor Output
en.summary: Start the motor output chain with PWM, LEDC, and H-Bridge control.
en.description: This lesson helps students understand how output signals become real motor drive behavior and lays the hardware foundation for precise control.
coreContent: Learn how PWM controls output intensity
Use LEDC syntax to drive motor signals
Wire an H-Bridge and verify direction control

zh-TW.title: 訊號品質與輸入穩定
zh-TW.summary: 理解輸入訊號品質、取樣穩定性與感測可靠度之間的關係。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 先從 pullup、debounce、ADC 解析度與取樣率切入，建立學員對穩定輸入與可靠量測的基本判斷能力。
coreContent: 用 FSM 定義控制狀態
用 millis 與 hardware timer 管理時間
建立主控制迴圈與安全停機條件

en.title: Signal Quality and Input Stability
en.summary: Understand the relationship between input quality, sampling stability, and sensing reliability.
en.description: This lesson introduces pullups, debouncing, ADC resolution, and sampling rate to build a practical sense for stable inputs and reliable measurements.
coreContent: Understand why pullups and debouncing matter
Compare ADC resolution with signal quality
Tune sampling rate to avoid unstable input

zh-TW.title: 運動映射
zh-TW.summary: 把搖桿輸入映射成車體速度與轉向行為。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 透過 unicycle model 與 response curve 的概念，把使用者操作轉換成更自然、更可控的運動輸出。
coreContent: 用 Fetch 發送控制指令
建立 Async WebServer 的回應流程
處理 CORS 與安全性限制

en.title: Motion Mapping
en.summary: Map joystick input into vehicle speed and steering behavior.
en.description: This lesson uses the unicycle model and response curves to convert user intent into motion output that feels natural and controllable.
coreContent: Map joystick input to speed and direction
Use the unicycle model to explain vehicle motion
Adjust response curves for natural control feel

zh-TW.title: 控制邏輯核心
zh-TW.summary: 建立控制狀態機與時間管理的核心迴路。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員用 FSM、millis 與 hardware timer 組出主控制流程，並開始考慮安全停機與節奏控制。
coreContent: 建立 BLE advertising 與 connection 的概念
把非同步 BLE 與控制流程串接
設計 notify 回傳與狀態同步

en.title: Control Logic Core
en.summary: Build the core control loop around state machines and time management.
en.description: This lesson uses FSM, millis, and hardware timers to assemble the main control flow while introducing safe-stop and timing discipline.
coreContent: Define the control state machine
Use millis and hardware timers for timing
Build the main loop with safe-stop behavior

zh-TW.title: 狀態與訊息傳遞
zh-TW.summary: 把控制狀態與 HTTP 訊息交換整理成一致的通訊流程。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員理解狀態一致性、request lifecycle 與前後端訊息同步，為後續 Web / BLE 控制做準備。

en.title: State and Messaging
en.summary: Organize control state and HTTP message exchange into a consistent communication flow.
en.description: This lesson introduces state consistency, request lifecycle, and frontend-backend synchronization as preparation for later Web and BLE control.
coreContent: Establish rules for state consistency
Understand the HTTP request lifecycle
Connect frontend messages with state updates

zh-TW.title: Web 控制堆疊
zh-TW.summary: 整合 Fetch、Async WebServer 與 CORS 安全，建立 Web 控制堆疊。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 把瀏覽器端控制請求、ESP32 端回應流程與跨域安全串接起來，形成可實作的 Web 控制路徑。

en.title: Web Control Stack
en.summary: Integrate Fetch, Async WebServer, and CORS security into a web control stack.
en.description: This lesson connects browser control requests, ESP32 response handling, and cross-origin security into a practical web control path.
coreContent: Send control commands with Fetch
Build the Async WebServer response flow
Handle CORS and security restrictions

zh-TW.title: 連線模式
zh-TW.summary: 比較 Wi-Fi 與 BLE 連線模式，理解各自的資料結構與適用場景。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員從 AP/STA、BLE properties 與 GATT 結構出發，建立選擇連線方式時的架構判斷能力。

en.title: Connectivity Modes
en.summary: Compare Wi-Fi and BLE connectivity modes and understand their data structures and use cases.
en.description: This lesson uses AP/STA, BLE properties, and GATT structure to build architectural judgment when selecting a connectivity mode.
coreContent: Compare Wi-Fi AP and STA use cases
Understand the role of BLE properties
Read the GATT service and characteristic structure

zh-TW.title: BLE 傳輸
zh-TW.summary: 從廣播、連線到通知，完成 BLE 傳輸主線。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 讓學員把 BLE advertising、connection、notify 與非同步流程完整串起來，建立可用的遙控傳輸層。

en.title: BLE Transport
en.summary: Complete the BLE transport path from advertising and connection to notifications.
en.description: This lesson connects BLE advertising, connection, notify, and async flow into a usable transport layer for remote control.
coreContent: Understand BLE advertising and connection setup
Connect asynchronous BLE with the control flow
Design notify feedback and status sync

zh-TW.title: 部署與更新
zh-TW.summary: 以 MTU、OTA 原則與安全更新機制完成部署收尾。
zh-TW.description: 這個 lesson 將連線效能、更新策略與安全性整合成完整的部署流程，讓學員具備上線與維護的基本能力。

en.title: Deployment Update
en.summary: Finish deployment with MTU, OTA principles, and secure update mechanisms.
en.description: This lesson integrates connection performance, update strategy, and security into a complete deployment flow for release and maintenance.
coreContent: Understand how MTU affects throughput
Build the basic OTA update flow
Confirm the security boundary of updates
